texto: I'm a wise Latina woman. Whatever, man. Thank God I'm not in politics, because the fact that you have to explain everything - I'd kill myself. I can't take all those little things they dissect. I'm like, 'Oh my God, get a life.' I don't have time for this.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Justina Machado: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I'm a wise Latina woman. Whatever, man. Thank God I'm not in politics, because the fact that you …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que gratidao, vida, time pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de time e myself.
